narrative:
Joshua Kimmich is a Defensive Midfield player for Germany. His overall rating of 7.5/10 places him in the top 1% of defensive midfields at this tournament. This rating is primarily driven by strong club form, with 81% from the last two seasons and 19% from this World Cup.

Kimmich demonstrates strong creative output, with 0.51 assists per 90 minutes and 2.04 key passes per 90 minutes at this World Cup. However, his attacking threat is limited, evidenced by just 0.03 expected goals per 90 minutes and 0.765 shots per 90 minutes in the tournament. Defensively, he contributes 1.53 tackles and 1.02 interceptions per 90 minutes.

Kimmich is a pivotal figure for Germany, orchestrating play from defensive midfield and influencing the build-up. Scouts and fans should observe his continued ability to create chances, highlighted by his 0.286 expected assists per 90 minutes. His role in controlling the tempo and supplying the attack will be critical in upcoming games.
